summary: Added CultistPortalEntity adapter for TC4 EntityCultistPortal.
Added TaintacleGiantEntity adapter for TC4 EntityTaintacleGiant.
Replaced lock-cycle cultist/taint placeholder boss branches with real registered entities.
Added renderers for cultist portal, taintacle giant, mind spider and eldritch tile block entities.
Added LivingEntity overload for Outer Lands boss death loot.

cleanup.quarantined_items_policy: Preserved from Stage253-262: hidden from creative and blocked from lootbag output; no new quarantined registry ids added in this batch.
placeholder_replacements: TileEldritchLock cultist branch: Crimson Praetor placeholder -> CultistPortalEntity
TileEldritchLock taint branch: Warden taint placeholder -> TaintacleGiantEntity
MindSpider client block-placeholder registration -> dedicated TC4MindSpiderRenderer

known_limitations: Full Gradle compile was not completed in sandbox because Gradle wrapper needs internet to download gradle-7.5.1-bin.zip.
TaintacleSmall is not yet split into its own entity.
Cultist portal renderer is a 1.19.2 translucent quad bridge, not exact legacy GL.
